TPGS NOPL 100-A-1 Planned Outage -- COMPLETE


Notice Text:

Effective 9:00AM CCT April 9, 2026, Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) will have completed the previously posted maintenance effecting meters MR 40332 - PERMIAN HWY PIPELINE (TPGS1130R) and MR 40333 - KM HOUSTON CENTRAL PIPELINE (COPANO) (TPGS1010R), all restrictions associated with this outage have been lifted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.


BackPrint

Notice Text:

Effective 9:00AM CCT April 9, 2026, Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) will have completed the previously posted maintenance effecting meters MR 40332 - PERMIAN HWY PIPELINE (TPGS1130R) and MR 40333 - KM HOUSTON CENTRAL PIPELINE (COPANO) (TPGS1010R), all restrictions associated with this outage have been lifted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
